objective:
[Momentum] sur 0GUSDC en 1h. Indicateurs : EMA + ADX + AROON. Entrées : Long/Short si adx >50 ou <50, BOLLINGER+STOCHASTIC pour les filtres entre 30-70 de RSI. Sorties : SL = TP = PV. Risk management: StopLoss = Entry Price - 1*ATR, TakeProfit = Entry Price + 2*ATR.

L'objectif est d'explorer des combinaisons inhabituelles en utilisant l'ADX et Aroon pour repérer le trend, puis de s'appuyer sur les EMA et BOLLINGER+STOCHASTIC pour anticiper une reprise du filtre entre 30-70 RSI. Cette stratégie va utiliser des stop loss basés sur l'ATR pour limiter le risque, tout en proposant un take profit de deux fois l'ATR pour maximiser les gains.

iterations.hypothesis: Ajustement structurel basé sur le diagnostic précédent.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] I plan to use momentum indicators EMA, ADX and RSI along with ATR for stop loss and take profit decisions. The strategy is based on the hypothesis that market structure can be adjusted according to past performance data. If results are poor (negative return), I would change the threshold of ATR or modify the conditions for entry long by adjusting the values of EMA cross above EMA(short) and ADX > 25 AND ATR > threshold.
[Backup plan] If results are mediocre (low Sharpe), I will try to adjust parameters like changing the period length of EMA, modifying RSI filter level or increasing take profit value.

iterations.hypothesis: Using ATR based risk management and trend following strategy with RSI and Bollinger Bands to identify a strong uptrend.

It is based on trend following principles and uses the EMA for anticipatory breakout signals. Risk management focuses on limiting losses with a stop loss based on AT...,

iterations.hypothesis: Exploring a new approach for improved results using momentum, ADX and Aroon along with Bollinger bands and Donchian channels. This strategy aims to identify a trending market and capitalize on it by entering a long position when the price breaks out above the upper Bollinger band and the RSI is over 50 while also confirming an uptrend with the ADX and exiting at the first sign of a trend reversal or when the RSI falls below 50. Similarly, it enters a short position when the price breaks out below the lower Donchian channel and the RSI is under 50 while also confirming a downtrend with the ADX and exiting at the first sign of a trend reversal or when the RSI rises above 50.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy uses momentum, ADX and Aroon indicators along with Bollinger bands to identify trending markets. While the current iteration shows poor results (negative return), it is important to note that backtesting does not guarantee future performance. The potential weaknesses of this strategy are the lack of diversification as well as overfitting due to limited market data used in testing. To improve results, parameter adjustments could be made such as widening Bollinger bands or adjusting RSI thresholds for longer periods. If current approach fails, a more diversified and robust strategy incorporating other indicators can be explored.
[Backup plan] * Further backtesting using different timeframes (e.g., 1h -> 4h) to improve robustness * Incorporating other technical indicators such as MACD or RSI to further enhance the signal-to-noise ratio * Diversifying across multiple assets and markets for better risk management.

iterations.hypothesis: Ajustement structurel basé sur le diagnostic précédent.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy uses a combination of ADX, Aroon and EMA to identify trends followed by BOLLINGER+STOCHASTIC for identifying the right entry point. It also has risk management in place with stop loss and take profit levels. If results are poor (negative return), I would look into adjusting my exit rules to minimize losses such as reducing the atr threshold or eliminating stops based on atr entirely.
[Backup plan] If this strategy fails, I could consider using a different technical indicator that may be more effective in identifying trends in 2ZUSDC market. Additionally, I could also explore other risk management techniques such as adjusting stop loss and take profit levels to maximize profits and minimize losses respectively.

leaderboard.hypothesis: Using ATR based risk management and trend following strategy with RSI and Bollinger Bands to identify a strong uptrend.

pre_reflection.text:
[Pre-reflection] This strategy uses momentum, ADX and Aroon indicators along with Bollinger bands to identify trending markets. While the current iteration shows poor results (negative return), it is important to note that backtesting does not guarantee future performance. The potential weaknesses of this strategy are the lack of diversification as well as overfitting due to limited market data used in testing. To improve results, parameter adjustments could be made such as widening Bollinger bands or adjusting RSI thresholds for longer periods. If current approach fails, a more diversified and robust strategy incorporating other indicators can be explored.
[Backup plan] * Further backtesting using different timeframes (e.g., 1h -> 4h) to improve robustness * Incorporating other technical indicators such as MACD or RSI to further enhance the signal-to-noise ratio * Diversifying across multiple assets and markets for better risk management.
